characters.name: 38 Special
characters.description:
38 SpecialFull NameDon BarnesDonnie Van ZantDanny ChaunceyLarry JunstromBobby CappsGary MoffattRoleAnimated versions of 38 SpecialFirst AppearanceBurned and Reburned AgainVoice ActorThemselvesSpeciesHumansHeightMediumHair ColorBrownBlondeLight BrownOccupationMusicians38 Special, stylized.38 Special, are a group of animated versions of the real life band38 Special. They are friends and sexual partners ofKrystalin the show.
They first appeared in theSquidbilliesepisode "Burned and Reburned Again", they were then referenced in theTrampled By Turtlesmusic video, which was released on YouTube in 2012. All of the 38 Special members are Don Barnes, Donnie Van Zant, Danny Chauncey, Larry Junstrom, Bobby Capps, and Gary Moffatt respectively. Donnie Van ZantDanny ChaunceyLarry JunstromBobby CappsGary Moffatt BlondeLight Brown

characters.name: Al-Qaeda
characters.description: Al-QaedaFull NameAl-QaedaRoleMuslim Group, The main antagonists of "America: Why I Love Her"First AppearanceAmerica: Why I Love HerVoice ActorVariousSpeciesHumansHeightVariousHair ColorBlackOccupationTerroristsFamilyVariousAl-Qaedais a group of very religious muslims part of a militant Salafist Islamist multi-national organization of the same name. They wanted to invade the country of Alabama. The Al-Qaedans are the main antagonists of the 22-minuteSquidbilliesspecial "America: Why I Love Her". There are many Al-Qaedans and, while most of them look similar, there is one of the Al-Qaedans that doesn't look right as he is riding a roller with hook hands, no arms or legs. During the events of "America: Why I Love Her", whenEarly&Rustytrust-pass on the Al-Qaedan's Land, Early shoots one of their cows belonging to them when Rusty wanted food to eat, after some conflict withThe Sheriff, two Al-Qaedans are seen holding shotguns, Sheriff mentioned to Early how he can steal from the god-fearin' men, the two Al-Qaedans hide their guns, Rusty points to a crescent mono and a star symbol, one of the Al-Qaedans say's "Uh, we're giving the old rugged cross a new spin, It's the new Christianity, It's very cool and modern, you know", Rusty points to a a photo ofOsama Bin Laden, the Al-Qaedan say's "No, no, it's uh, Kenny bin loggins -- "Highway to the Danger zone", the other Al-Qaedan's paint the picture blue, the Al-Qaedan say's "So, please have a loaf of our homemade bread, And take your oil-eating beast and be on your way", "For soon, the beds of your", "Creeks will run re-e-e-e-d", "Thank you for coming, and have a nice day", they close the gate, soon Sheriff say's "Sorry If I cast any doubt", "Everything else", scenes of the Al-Qaedan's at their camp, training of their invasion of Alabama, like firing at targets & dealing with their obstacles, soon after Rusty continues to starve & Early repeats the first song he said earlierNature's Bounty, a Al-Qaedan say's "No, no, no!, wait!, p-please, let us take the hungry, angry, suggestible young man for the afternoon, we are having marshmallow roast", the Al-Qaedan dials his phone, a explosion happens, the next scene shows a car on fire, while three Al-Qaedan's roast marshmallows, Rusty wanted to stay with the Al-Qaedan's, Early told "Whatever", while Early & Sheriff drive in the police car & hold the headless cow that Early previously killed, soon when the two are driving away, Sheriff mentioned that he was glad Rusty got playmates, Sheriff reveals the mirror showing three Al-Qaedan's putting a bag Rusty's head, Sheriff mentioned that the Al-Qaedan's were dangerously older than Rusty. LaterGranny& a armless & legless Al-Qaedan on a roller sing the song, "Yellow Cake", Granny sings "My heart is a flutter, I've found me a suiter, A handsome young man is after my cooter. I met him while trolling on Hezbollah hotties, where I posted shots of my hot nubile body, the Al-Qaedan sings "It's for her alone that my lonely hea

characters.name: Alien Audience
characters.description:
Alien AudienceFull NameAlien AudienceLocationOuter SpaceRoleAttendantsFirst AppearanceLermSpeciesAliensFamilyLerm Edwards(son to Lerm's mother and father)Lil Cuyler(ex-daughter-in-law)Herschel Walker Cuyler(step-grandson)Lil's other children(step-grandchildren; deceased)Alien Audienceare an audience of alien creatures inSquidbillies.
There a bunch of aliens of different alien species who attendLerm EdwardsandLil Cuyler's wedding at theReverend'schurch. Lerm's parents also appear in the audience. They exclusively appear in the episode "Lerm". They are last seen being crushed by Lerm's UFO when he crashes the vehicle into the church. Lil Cuyler(ex-daughter-in-law)Herschel Walker Cuyler(step-grandson)Lil's other children(step-grandchildren; deceased) The group of aliens have different appearances and species.

characters.name: Alien Elders
characters.description: Alien EldersFull NameAlien EldersLocationUFORoleAlien EldersFirst AppearanceBubba TrubbaVoice ActorGregory Alan WilliamsSpeciesAliensFamilySame speciesTheAlien Eldersare two alien-like creatures and elders ofPlumber Bubbafrom the planet Ala-Bama and characters in "Bubba Trubba". They came to Earth with a disguised Plumber Bubba. According to Plumber Bubba, they're considered to be geniuses. Two of the aliens are green with a black goatee, with green spikes and a blue one with a big ear and a rat tail. Both aliens have weird looking eyes. There are different aliens are also shown in a sequence powering up a machine, they were colored brown, a white haired blue one, a pink one, a light brown one with fish fins and a blue one with green spots and red eyes. The main purpose of the Elders was to steal the brains of his supposedly intelligent fans of Plumber Bubba (though it is later revealed that one of the Elders chose the south because he liked the southern food and folk art) in order to use their "intello-secretions" to create weapons capable of destroying all matter and time, leaving behind only a "Memorial Day Weekend." They later encounterEarly,Rusty, and a dying Plumber Bahah while their is house destroyed and they end up summoning a weapon, which they have to slap the pig prop on it and it moves, later on it gets destroyed after crashing into a tree. The main purpose of the Elders was to steal the brains of his supposedly intelligent fans of Plumber Bubba (though it is later revealed that one of the Elders chose the south because he liked the southern food and folk art) in order to use their "intello-secretions" to create weapons capable of destroying all matter and time, leaving behind only a "Memorial Day Weekend." They later encounterEarly,Rusty, and a dying Plumber Bahah while their is house destroyed and they end up summoning a weapon, which they have to slap the pig prop on it and it moves, later on it gets destroyed after crashing into a tree.

characters.name: Amber Jean
characters.description: Amber JeanFull NameAmber JeanBirthdayJune 8, 2008First AppearanceKrystal, LightVoice ActorMary KraftSpeciesConjoined/Siamese twinHair ColorBlondeFamilyKrystal(twin sister)Russell "Rusty" Cuyler(nephew)Early Cuyler(former brother in law)Tammi(niece) Russell "Rusty" Cuyler(nephew)Early Cuyler(former brother in law)Tammi(niece) Amber Jeanis a character inSquidbillies. She exclusively appears in the episode "Krystal, Light". She is the conjoined/Siamese twin ofKrystaland the aunt ofRusty Cuyler. She was able to speak with the same southern accent Krystal has.

characters.name: Anastasia Evertree
characters.description: Anastasia EvertreeFull NameAnastasia EvertreeFirst AppearanceOl' HootieVoice ActorBlayr NiasSpeciesHumanHair ColorBlackOccupationOrnithologist Dr. Anastasia Evertree, also simply known as justAnastasia Evertree, is a minor character inSquidbillies. Dr. Anastasia Evertree is an African-American woman, who is a ornithologist, which is a bird expert or a person who studies birds. She came toDougal Countybecause an "owlproblem" happening, which capturedGranny CuylerandRusty Cuylerrespectively. She owns a tranquilizer gun that can fire tranquilizer darts, which she uses when she is going to hunt down and kill thegigantic owlas she teams up with theSheriff,Deputy Denny, andEarly Cuyler, which get eventually captured by the said giant owl, which she calls "Ol' Hootie," who is later killed.

characters.name: Appalachian Black Bear
characters.description: Appalachian Black BearFull NameAppalachian Black BearLocationForest of AppalachiaRoleWild SpeciesFirst AppearanceHetero-Cephalo AgendaSpeciesAppalachian Black BearFamilyFather and DaughterAppalachian Black Bearis a somewhat fictional wild black bear species that appears inSquidbillies. They appear exclusively in the episode "Hetero-Cephalo Agenda". Three Appalachian Black Bears appear in the said episode, with two of them as a father, and his daughter. After Early protests gay marriage, throughout the episode, and pretending that he married a paint can, vacuum cleaner, and a hotdog, he found.Dan Halenforced him to marry one of the species as it would be something insane, and would get on television in a massive pride parade through downtownDougal County, where he would exchange vows with the beast of the forest. Dan wanted it to double his sales (unfortunately will still lose some customers) with "The Rotund Jesus Freaks". Who will all unite in a brainless effort to support them with a net gain of slightly more since he is promoting family values for families. A Appalachian Black Bear's father appears in the "Straight Pride" parade, chained up on a float in order for Early to exchange the bear's paw in marriage, but it does fail. Despite this, a wedding happens between the daughter of that Appalachian Black Bear, and Early atChicken On The Cross, with some citizens of Dougal County, and a bear audience.

characters.name: Appraiser
characters.description: AppraiserFull NameAppraiserRoleAppraiserFirst AppearanceAn Officer and a Dental DamVoice ActorDave WillisSpeciesMaleHeightLargeHair ColorBrownOccupationAppraiserAppraiseris a character inSquidbillies. The Appraiser appears exclusively in the episode "An Officer and a Dental Dam". He works at a "rummage roundup gift shop", and wears small glasses. He encountersEarly, andRustyat his gift shop, when they sell stuff to him related toRuby Jean, which are expired cans of powdered milks, and Early gets a clock related to "Burt Reynolds Centerfold Driftwood Lacquered". He then shows him a special-edition-editionCock Johnsonjumbo refill soda mug, but wasn't worth nothing since he broke three others. Early then shoots the merchandise, until some papers fall out, and one of them is grabbed by him. He doesn't seem to understand the scribblings on the papers. But explained by Early, he is then amazed that it is a correspondence between one Ruby Jean, and confederateGeneral Robert E. Lee. The letters of worth also at least $300 as that is interrupted byDan Halen.

characters.name: Baby Dracula Squids
characters.description:
Baby Dracula SquidsFull NameBaby Dracula SquidsBirthdaySeptember 24, 2006LocationDougal CountyFirst AppearanceButt TroubleSpeciesAppalachian Mud Squid/Dracula hybridsHair ColorBlackFamilyRusty(father) and presumably the rest of the Cuyler familyBaby Dracula Squidsare a species ofsquidand a group of offspring ofRustyand creatures inSquidbillies.
They only appear exclusively in one episode of the show. The episode is called "Butt Trouble". As their name implies, they are hybrids of theAppalachian Mud Squidspecies and have characteristics of Draculas. They originally hatched from blue alien rock-like eggs coming out of Rusty's ass. Suggesting that Rusty is the mother of all of these creatures, due to their squid like appearance, although their relation to the Cuyler family is never explained. TheSheriffalso claimed that its "Dracula" and the "send the Blackhawks" later on as the Sheriff runs away and ends up claiming that "they'll are going to kill us all".

The babies prepare to drink Early's milk from his nipples, but all are then killed and eaten by a flock ofcrows.

characters.name: Baseball Player
characters.description: Baseball PlayerFull NameBaseball PlayerLocationAtlantaRoleAtlanta Baseball PlayerFirst AppearanceTerminus TroubleSpeciesHumanHeightMediumHair ColorBrownOccupationBaseball Player Baseball Playeris a minor character inSquidbillies. He is an unnamed non-speaking Baseball Player appears on the field of a baseball stadium in Atlanta exclusively appearing in the episode "Terminus Trouble". While he doesn't speak any lines in the episode, he does impact the rest of the episode as a whole. What happened wasSheriffandEarlyfirst discover him by using Sheriff's binoculars, Early thought the player was looking at him "crossways", though Sheriff mentioned that he's is giving the steal signal, through Early doesn't response to this very well, Sheriff mentioned he wasn't looking at him, however Early then beats up the baseball player down there.Rustycomes down there to beats up the player too.

characters.name: Bashatizing Smash Master
characters.description:
Bashatizing Smash MasterFull NameBashatizing Smash MasterLocationThe StadiumRoleDemolition derby monsterFirst AppearanceCondition: Demolition!Voice Actor???SpeciesRobotic vehicle monsterHeightLargeTheBashatizing Smash Masteris a gigantic robotic monster made entirely out of vehicles only seen in the episode "Condition: Demolition!". He is a deadly, legendary and ultimate truck eater described byDan Halen.Early's son,Rustywas forced to defeat the monster and win a iPod in a demolition derby.
Although the monster's existence is revealed to a hallucination. In realty, all of the characters were hallucinating by illegal testing of very dangerous body spray inthe stadium, according toGranny, which is called "Appalachian temptation male body spray", but its appearance resemblesIce Wind. The monster is extremely large, and full of machinery from various vehicles. Has red eyes and light, bloody machinery teeth, a tail with a engine on it, and a helicopter for one of its hands. The monster has a police car and ambulance for his feet. It's body is covered with engines, motors, and gears. The smash master has a semi-truck for a head with sharp teeth covered with some blood on its mouth. One of its arms has a mechanic claw with some blood on it. The monster is colored in various colors such as red, orange, blues, lime greens, grays, browns, and yellows. The monster has various abilities seen in the episode. He is seen destroying the seats of Dan Halen's stadium due to its enormous size and can easily damage other property such as theSheriff's police car (even killing people such as the Sheriff by crushing him with his foot and breaking the seats of half of the stadium that people were sitting on, leading them fall off) and even carried the boat part of Early'struck-boat-truck. The monster can fire lasers out of its eyes, which blows up Rusty's truck-boat-truck. The monster, while speaks in "English" language, and he also communicates by monstrous roars, such as roaring like a bull.

characters.name: Bearded Squids
characters.description: Bearded Squids1621Full NameBearded SquidsBirthdayMay 10, 1586 November 13, 1565 July 18, 1586 June 26, 1588 March 22, 1564 April 30, 1546 September 26, 1555 (age 58 67 61 55 43; (deceased)LocationNorth Georgia mountainsRoleAncestors of the CuylersFirst AppearanceThanks-TakingVoice ActorN/BSpeciesAppalachian Mud SquidsHeightSmallHair ColorBrown, Black, and RedBearded Squidsare ancient ancestors of theAppalachian Mud Squidfamily. The Bearded Squids consist of purple squid, green squid, and a blue father baby with beards, including a baby blue squid. They appear in a flashback told byEarlyandGranny. The Bearded Squids had their own Thanksgiving, by eating a deer, but are interrupted by a bunch of Indians & Horses. A twenty-minute war between the species happened with the squids throwing, and chucking acorns at them, while the Indians threatened to shoot arrows at the squid clan since they wanted to get off their own land, and they were never taught any English at their own casinos. Their fates are unknown, but they may have died.

characters.name: Billy Morton
characters.description:
Billy MortonFull NameBilly MortonBirthdaySeptember 6, 1982 (age 39)LocationDougal CountyRoleRecurring background characterFirst AppearanceThis Show Is Called SquidbilliesVoice ActorNick IngkatanuwatSpeciesHumanOccupationFootball CaptainFamilyUnnamed father (father)Billy Mortonis a recurring character inSquidbillies. 
He is a young boy that is armless and legless, who is also the captain of the local high school football team. His father gave him two-by-four wooden boards as replacement legs and two tree limbs as arms. 
Usually, Billy Morton appears as a background character in his appearances. In "Rebel with a Claus", on Christmas Eve,Santa Clausmisses Billy's house and accidently delivers a basketball hoop toKrystalinstead, this basketball hoop was obviously a gift/present for Billy Morton. In the episode "Velvet Messiah",  Early, posing as Jesus Christ, attempts to "heal" him by smashing a bottle of Thoughtless gentleman brand drinking whiskey over his head.

characters.name: Birthday Clown
characters.description: Birthday ClownRoleClownFirst AppearanceClowny FreaksVoice ActorLarry WachsSpeciesHumanHair ColorRedOccupationClownBirthday Clownis a minor character inSquidbillies. A Birthday Clown is seen attending a birthday party for one of the son of anunnamed African Americancharacter in the episode "Clowny Freaks". The clown approaches bothLil, andGranny, mentioning about the whereabouts of a birthday boy, but Granny then upsets the clown by telling that she is what he is looking for, due to her attractive towards him. Granny then turns his orange dog balloon into the shape of a blurred erect penis, but the clown mentioned that he is only in the party to see the birthday boy, but is interrupted byEarlyzapping with a zap gun, knocking him out. He lays on the ground, presumably injured, or death, andRustythen comes, and rubs off his clown makeup onto his face, and takes off his shoes, hair, and hat. Making Rusty act like a "clowny freak."

characters.name: Biscuit
characters.description: BiscuitFull NameBillie Biscuit SamsonBirthday4/1/2000 - 6/22/2016 (age unknown)RoleGlenn's dogSpeciesDogFamilyGlennGlenn's WifeGlenn's ChildrenBiscuitis a dog that was originally named "Billie" that was a pet owned byGlenn, and his family. He appears in the episodes "Thanks-Taking", and makes a small cameo in "The Guzzle Bumpkin". Glenn's WifeGlenn's Children Prior to the events of "Thanks-Taking", Glenn, andhis childrenhad a pet dog named "Billie", but Biscuit ended up getting lost in the town ofDougal Countyone day, and the family had to search for him, and putting "Lost Dog" posters on walls.

characters.name: Blondie Stripper
characters.description:
Blondie StripperFull NameBlondie StripperLocationThe Jiggle HutRoleStripper at the Jiggle HutFirst AppearanceRich Dan, Poor DanVoice ActorBlondie StrangeSpeciesHumanHair ColorBlondeOccupationStripper Blondie Stripperis a minor character inSquidbillies. She is voiced by Blondie Strange.
As her implies, is a stripper atThe Jiggle Hut, with blonde hair, big lips, and eyelashes, and wearing red high heels, and an American themed bikini. She is often seen stripping with other characters such asDan Halen,Early Cuyler,Leroy, andSheriff. While her real name is never mentioned, she was called "Blondie", on two occasions by Early and Leroy respectively. Blondie Stripper made her first appearance, where she was stripping for Dan Halen, while the latter drinks beer, in a glass cup, and talks about his recent bankruptcy. After it was over, the stripper then stated it was a nice story, and asks for 20 bucks, while calling him "sugar", Dan then told her to send the invoice toMelissa, as they pay Net 30, while putting the card into his panties.

characters.name: Bobby
characters.description: BobbyFull NameBobbyBirthdayMay 29, 1970 (age 54)RoleEmployee atBallmartFirst AppearanceBallad of the Latrine MarineVoice ActorBilly Wayne DavisSpeciesHumanHeightLargeHair ColorBrownOccupationBallmart EmployeeBobbyis a minor character inSquidbillies. He is voiced by Billy Wayne Davis. Bobby is a Caucasian-skinned human that wears a blue outfit with a blue shirt, pants, white tie, a brown belt, and brown shoes. Bobby has brown hair, with a ponytail, all over his head and has a goatee, with a small mustache and eyebrows on his face. He has a American-styled nametag. Bobby is aBallmartworker that works at Ballmart, who is shown to be very strict with certain policies in Ballmart such asEarlybeing in the women's restroom, to keep it safe from men going in there for the women, whileSharifis checking on it and tells him to relax,Galvingreeting people at Ballmart's doors, includingGranny, due to her not being on the Ballmart's "do not greet" list and Early bringing hisSasquatch Coolerinto the building, due to the cooler's gases smoking up the building, telling him to get out or buy something at the store, or when the recenthead liceoutbreak happened in "The Liceman Cometh", he told everyone that the lice shampoo was one per costumer. WhenLeroythought Bobby was talking to him due to Galvin's greeting, Leroy mentioned that he was hired for Ballmart to be the official greeter, but Leroy wasn't to talking him since he was talking to Galvin. Bobby is aBallmartworker that works at Ballmart, who is shown to be very strict with certain policies in Ballmart such asEarlybeing in the women's restroom, to keep it safe from men going in there for the women, whileSharifis checking on it and tells him to relax,Galvingreeting people at Ballmart's doors, includingGranny, due to her not being on the Ballmart's "do not greet" list and Early bringing hisSasquatch Coolerinto the building, due to the cooler's gases smoking up the building, telling him to get out or buy something at the store, or when the recenthead liceoutbreak happened in "The Liceman Cometh", he told everyone that the lice shampoo was one per costumer. WhenLeroythought Bobby was talking to him due to Galvin's greeting, Leroy mentioned that he was hired for Ballmart to be the official greeter, but Leroy wasn't to talking him since he was talking to Galvin. He often glares at people such as Early for reasons such as in "Scorn on the 4th of July", where he does this when Early picks out a metal helmet from a War 4 Monger video game, before he salutes to him. He is rarely happy but he does cheer and act a little bit when he sprayed and killed all of the head lice off Early's head with lice assassin, and having his first date withTammi, as seen in "This Show Was Called Squidbillies".

characters.name: Boyd
characters.description: BoydFull NameBoydBirthdayNovember 26, 1931 - October 15, 2017 (age 82; deceased)LocationBoyd's StoreDougal CountyRoleVictim of EarlyFirst AppearanceThis Show Is Called SquidbilliesVoice ActorPete SmithSpeciesHumanHair ColorWhiteOccupationStore ClerkFamilyAnunnamed wife Dougal County Boyd(November 26, 1931 - December 12, 2017) is a soft-spoken, passive, elderly, bearded clerk of the localtown convenience store.Earlyhas constantly robbed (and shot) him on numerous occasions, with him aware the entire time who he is, but is too compliant to stop him. Despite being robbed constantly by Early, Boyd is friendly towards him.

characters.name: Boyd's Wife
characters.description: Boyd's WifeFull NameBoyd's WifeBirthdayJune 22, 1931 (age 90)LocationDougal CountyRoleBoyd's WifeFirst AppearanceForever AutumnSpeciesHumanHair ColorWhiteOccupationUnknownFamilyBoyd(husband; deceased) Boyd's Wifeis the unnamed wife ofBoyd. She was first mentioned by Boyd in "Velvet Messiah" where it is revealed that he is apparently unable to satisfy his wife anymore. She is mentioned again in "Dove In An Iron Cage" where she is mentioned by theSheriff, who mentions that her husband had leukemia and didn't have any health insurance, so his wife shot him so she can collect life insurance and blamed the murder onRusty. This effects the main plot of the episode and explains why Rusty was put injailin the first place. Boyd's wife did eventually make her first physical appearance in theSeason 12premiere "Forever Autumn", replacing Boyd. She sits on a chair next to a desk withGlennand one ofDan Halen's unnamed workers as she listens to Dan Halen's new LEAF project in a meeting. She doesn't speak in the episode.

characters.name: Brock “Liberty” Bell
characters.description: Brock "Liberty" BellFull NameBrock "Liberty" BellBirthdayMarch 30, 1958 (age 66)LocationDougal CountyRoleRadio AnnouncerFirst AppearanceThe Big EVoice ActorDave StoneSpeciesHumanHeightMediumHair ColorGrayOccupationRadio AnnouncerBrock "Liberty" Bellis a minor character inSquidbillies. He is a radio announcer who hosts a radio show seen in the "The Big E", was later heard in "The Legend of Kid Squid" and "The Inkubator Lives!", and has made cameos in the episodes "Dewey Two-ey" and "Events by Russell" respectively. In his first appearance in "The Big E", a voice saying "And now back to Brock "Liberty" Bell!, are you ready to Brock?", Brock say's "That's right, Brock Bell here on cool A.M., 1680, The heat!, let's chap some hides D whip some opinions into shape!", a whip cracks, he then say's We got Early inDougal county, you're on the heat seat what's chappin' your hide, friend?",Earlylistening to the radio say's "Uh...,", Brock say's "Yes, sir, caller?", Early say's "Is it me on the radio now?", Brock say's "Yes, you are, caller, go ahead", Early said to him "Am I the ninth caller?, I mean, do I get them Randy Travis Tickets?". Brock then say's "Sir, the Randy Travis-Ganza was two weeks ago, could you please just state your business?", Early mentioned Uh, yeah, I-I want to say that the problem with the economy is, uh, there ain't no damn jobs I mean, I been working out of work since Friday at 5:00, And I'm going back to work Monday, but I ain't a-gonna like it".

characters.name: Bubba
characters.description: BubbaFull NameBubbaBirthdayJune 26, 1962 - November 7, 2021 (age 59)LocationBubba's Discount BurialsRoleRusty's bossFirst AppearanceLet ’er R.I.P.Voice ActorWalton GogginsSpeciesHumanHair ColorBrownOccupationCorpse Prep (formerly) Bubbais a minor character inSquidbillies. Bubba isRussell "Rusty" Cuyler's grumpy boss with a very grumpy attitude that owns a corpse prep themed building/morgue called "Bubba's Discount Burials" that Rusty works at and does the job at doing "grave digging" while Bubba does corpse prep for dead bodies of people that have died such as picking out a man's brain through his nasal cavity that was over eight pounds. Bubba isRussell "Rusty" Cuyler's grumpy boss with a very grumpy attitude that owns a corpse prep themed building/morgue called "Bubba's Discount Burials" that Rusty works at and does the job at doing "grave digging" while Bubba does corpse prep for dead bodies of people that have died such as picking out a man's brain through his nasal cavity that was over eight pounds. During work, Bubba often gets mad at Rusty for not completing a certain task that needs to be done such as getting a late start on digging a hole for a coffin that got stuck in the sunroof of a vehicle, which he thought it was easier to get it out and later if he backed it in, which was meant for a funeral thatKyle Nubbinswas preisting at, which Rusty didn't want Nubbins to tell his boss about. He was also asking about some hearse keys and Bubba telling him to get his "worthless" ass to doing the job of trying to relight the pilot of the building, which Rusty didn't do since it still smelled like gas in there, which Bubba did it instead. When Rusty mentioned that he nicked a rock or something, he told him that rocks don't make a hissing sound, and called him "stupid" as he busted a gas line to the crematorium, which he describes as a "pain in his ass", which was the cause of the pilot needing to being relighted. With a very grumpy attitude, Bubba complained that it was "fucking" hot outside, and when stated "always fucking gotta have it your way, goddamnit". when Rusty didn't relight the pilot and decided to crack open a window. Bubba then told him that he can go ahead and then said it as a "Typical millennial, always looking for the nearest exit when there's work to be done".
